name: Thit Ga Xao Dam Gung Sa (Chicken with Lemon Grass)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones and skin from chicken thighs; cut chicken into 1-inch pieces.
2. Mix lemon grass and 1 tbsp fish sauce in a glass or plastic bowl; stir in chicken. Cover and refrigerate at least 1 hour.
3. Heat oil in a wok or 10-inch skillet until hot. Add sliced onion and garlic; stir-fry for 1 minute.
4. Add chicken and scallions; stir-fry for 5 minutes. Reduce heat; cover and cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes.
5. Mix vinegar and ginger root in a separate bowl. Mix remaining ingredients except rice; stir into the chicken mixture. Stir in the reserved vinegar mixture.
6. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly; cook and stir until thickened, about 1 minute. Serve with cooked Rice.
